name: Lastpass
root_cause: Stole source code and accessed development environment via compromised developer account (an IAM User)
escalation_vectors: Unknown pivot point into production environment. Later compromise of a privileged engineer's personal machine to gain access to decryption keys for stolen data
impact: Internal and customer data broadly compromised, including backups of MFA database
